raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 1957 would allow public benefit recipients to receive information electronically regarding their applications and benefits.",
    "Modern technology can improve governmental efficiency and individual's lives.",
    "More than four million Californians rely on CalFresh benefits for food.",
    "Over one million Californians receive financial assistance from the California Work Opportunity and Responsibility to Kids program (CalWORKs).",
    "Electronic communication has increased efficiency for county human services agencies.",
    "Counties like Santa Clara have reduced the number of families who lose benefits by offering email, voice, and text communication options.",
    "AB 1957 aims to guide counties in adopting modern communication processes to enhance program efficiency and client access.",
    "The bill includes provisions to protect the privacy and rights of individuals who use electronic communication.",
    "Electronic communication and data storage in the bill must comply with state security standards."
  ]
}
```
